from astropy.io import fits
hdul = fits.open('file.fits')

commands.command:

wcs = WCS(hdul[0].header)

commands.command:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.imshow(hdul[0].data, cmap='gray')
plt.show()
commands.description: Plot a FITS image using Matplotlib

commands.command: import astropy.units as u; flux = 10 * u.erg / (u.cm**2 * u.s)
commands.description: Use the Astropy Units module to prevent dimensional errors in physical calculations and automated scripting.
Enable global verbose logging for all CLI operations to debug pipeline failures in automated cron jobs.
